notes: Alfred Linux 7.77 — sovereign desktop from Debian Trixie with Linux kernel.org 7.0.1 tree, Omahon Seal, and 42 Kingdom live-build hooks (Matthew 1:17 lineage; some stages split across multiple .hook.chroot files on disk). ISO builds sync every file from config/hooks/live into build/config/hooks before lb config (scripts/sync-hooks-to-build.sh; Docker inner runs it). AKJV — Perez Family Edition under /usr/share/alfred/bible/. Bible tongues: 48 entries in languages.conf (offline seeds incl. es/es-419/es-ES/lad/cbk, id/fa/my, etc.). AI: Omahon + Ollama primary; optional ai-providers.env for Anthropic Claude (Opus 4.7, Sonnet 4.6, Haiku 4.5 IDs in template + Omahon skel), OpenAI, Together, Groq, xAI; pip anthropic/openai/groq/together — backup only. First-boot TTS/he per README.
